statusPolicy.unlockedRequires: verified Prosthetic Tool upgrade weapon inventory record
statusPolicy.missingRequires: verified absence of the specific Prosthetic Tool upgrade weapon inventory record in USER_DATA000
statusPolicy.details: Prosthetic Tool upgrades are analyzed separately from base Prosthetic Tools. Base tool ownership and prerequisite availability do not infer upgrade ownership.

upgradeSourcePolicy.details: Community guide pages describe Prosthetic Tools as upgraded by the Sculptor after the base item is acquired. Exact material/prerequisite tree rows are not yet mapped from verified param data.

sourceLocation.acquisition: Unlock Spinning Shuriken from the Loaded Shuriken upgrade branch at the Sculptor.

prerequisites.details: Exact material and tree prerequisite rows have not been mapped from verified data.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 70100 and quantity 1 means this Prosthetic Tool upgrade is unlocked.
